name: Pie Plate Potato Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a pie plate with nonstick spray.
2. Slice the potato about 1/4 inch thick and lay the slices on the bottom of the pan, overlapping slightly to form a "crust."
3. Spray with nonstick spray again.
4. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes until slightly browned and potatoes are cooked.
5. Combine tomatoes, mushrooms, onion, and seasonings.
6. When the crust is ready, spread the mushroom mixture over it.
7. Top with olives and then cheese.
8. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Each serving: 295 calories, 21 grams protein, 14 grams total fat, 8 grams saturated fat, 22 grams carbohydrates, 42 milligrams cholesterol, 804 milligrams sodium. Food Groups: 3L Meat, 1 Bread, 1 Vegetable.
